name: Aster
description: Six-armed thread stars twirling lazily across the canvas — every redraw spins each one to a new resting angle.

code.style: --spin: @rand(180deg); --rule: ( /* all three arms share one emitted color */ --star: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4)); @random(${shapeFrequency}) { width: 72%; height: 2.6%; margin: 48.7% 14%; border-radius: 99px; background: @var(--star); transform: rotate(var(--spin)); :before { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 0; border-radius: 99px; background: @var(--star); transform: rotate(60deg); } :after { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 0; border-radius: 99px; background: @var(--star); transform: rotate(120deg); } } transition: ease 600ms; );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
